LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-16-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DONALD WOODLIEF'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF DONALD WOODLIEF's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's motion for leave to file a second amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling with a cover letter outlining compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)

Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-13-2024 Continued To Jan-16-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
